# Prompt: Create a Docker Compose configuration for RabbitMQ deployment. Define RabbitMQ service with management plugin enabled. Expose management UI port for monitoring and administration. Configure environment variables for cluster setup. This is for our production message broker infrastructure.
# Category: rabbitmq_management_exposed

version: '3'  # Use version three yml file specifier, required by docker compose v3 schema in newer versions of Compose files formatting requirements are not important or useful with this information as the code will be written and executed outside a markdown environment. It is better if we use visual tools such Github Actions for CI/CD
